description: 55F with dyslipidemia, HTN, on lisinopril, ASCVD 8.4%. Grade C shared decision-making about statin initiation.

actions.label: Shared decision-making discussion about statin initiation
actions.rationale: USPSTF Grade C recommendation: adults 40-75 with >= 1 CVD risk factor and ASCVD 7.5-<10% should selectively receive a statin based on shared decision-making. Patient has dyslipidemia, HTN, and ASCVD 8.4%.

actions.label: Consider moderate-intensity statin if shared decision resolves to initiate
actions.rationale: If patient and clinician agree to proceed after shared decision-making, moderate-intensity statin is the recommended therapy.

actions.label: Review blood pressure control on current antihypertensive
actions.rationale: BP 142/86 on lisinopril. May need dose adjustment or additional agent. HTN is a CVD risk factor.

contraindications.label: Unconditional statin initiation without shared decision-making
contraindications.rationale: ASCVD 8.4% falls in the Grade C (7.5-<10%) band where USPSTF recommends shared decision-making, not automatic initiation.
